name: WeChat Mini Program
requiredVerification: login and denied state review where relevant
platform permission review when permissions change
cloud function and access rule verification when touched
API error handling and degraded network review
release and rollback evidence when release behavior changes
releaseChecks: base library, privacy, permissions, cloud functions, access rules, production configuration, rollback, and monitoring are technically reviewed by Codex
project-bound evidence covers login, payment callbacks, cloud runtime, permission rejection, and release-impacting behavior

exact user consent is required only for a prepared Mini Program submission, provider-account action, payment or value transfer, real-user message, regulated-data export, or irreversible production-data effect

may: edit Mini Program pages, components, cloud functions, access rules, permissions, tests, and documentation inside the current governed task scope
derive and implement platform permission, cloud runtime, production configuration, migration, rollback, and verification choices from project evidence
mustNot: delegate cloud function, access rule, permission, production configuration, migration, dependency, rollback, or test strategy choices to the user

use provider credentials, submit a release, send a real-user message, create a payment or value-transfer effect, export regulated data, or perform an irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
